task_description: Phase 25: Create apps/quantcalendar/ - a standalone calendar app with AI scheduling, recurring events, booking links, buffer time, focus blocks, cancel detection, rescheduling, and weekly digests.

verification.summary: All 2545 tests pass (271 test files), including 51 new quantcalendar tests. Three review passes completed (v1: 7 issues found/5 fixed, v2: 2 issues found/2 fixed, v3: APPROVED). TypeScript strict mode passes.
